title: Loop node stops prematurely due to URL filtering
symptom: The loop node processes only a few items instead of the expected number, and the workflow completes successfully without errors.
not_this_if: The loop node is configured correctly without filters
root_cause: The loop node is configured to filter URLs based on a condition, but the split node processes URLs one at a time. If the first URL meets the condition but subsequent URLs do not, the workflow stops without producing an error, leading to incomplete processing.
fix_steps: Review the filter condition in the loop node
Ensure that the split node does not pass URLs that will be filtered out
Adjust the logic to handle cases where URLs may not meet the filter condition
agent_instruction: Adjust the filter condition in the loop node to ensure all relevant URLs are processed.
